steps.title: Business Entity Registration
steps.description: Register your bakery as a legal business entity (e.g., Sole Proprietorship, Partnership, or One Person Company) and obtain a Business PAN.
documents: Proof of Business Address (Rent Agreement or Utility Bill)
steps.authority: Ministry of Corporate Affairs / Local Registrar office

steps.title: Open Business Current Bank Account
steps.description: Set up a dedicated corporate current account under the registered business name for all bakery transactions.

steps.title: Fire Department No-Objection Certificate (NOC)
steps.description: Obtain clearances from the local fire safety department stating the bakery premises comply with fire safety codes.

steps.title: GST Registration Certificate
steps.description: Register for Goods and Services Tax (GST) to legally collect tax and claim input tax credits.
steps.authority: GSTN / Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs

steps.title: FSSAI Food Business Registration/License
steps.description: Register with the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) to ensure food safety and quality standards compliance.
documents: Proof of Possession of Premises (Rent Deed / Tax Bill)
List of Food Category to be prepared
Water Analysis Report from certified lab
Food Safety Management System (FSMS) Plan outline
steps.authority: Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI)

steps.title: Municipal Health and Trade License
steps.description: Acquire the trade license from the local municipal corporation to operate a food production and retail business in the area.
documents: Layout Plan of the Bakery setup
Medical Fitness Certificates for food handlers
